# Aevum

> The Python library that makes your AI agent's memory accountable.
> Apache-2.0 — https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum

## What Aevum is

Aevum is a Python library that gives AI agents a signed audit trail,
consent-checked data access, and verifiable decision records of past decisions —
three problems that tend to surface together in production.

It is not a memory framework. It does not replace Mem0, LangChain, or
LlamaIndex. It sits below those tools and makes whatever memory layer
you are using consent-gated and auditable.

## Five public functions

- ingest: consent-checked data ingestion with provenance and classification
- query: consent-gated, classification-ceiling-enforced context retrieval
- review: human-in-the-loop gate before irreversible agent actions
- commit: episodic event recording in the immutable sigchain ledger
- replay: verifiable retrieval of any past agent session

## Five unconditional barriers (cannot be bypassed)

1. Crisis detection — crisis content stops immediately, always
2. Classification ceiling — agents cannot access data above their clearance
3. Consent enforcement — no data access without a valid, scoped consent grant
4. Audit immutability — the sigchain cannot be modified or deleted
5. Provenance chain — every fact carries its full chain of custody

## Install

pip install aevum-core

## Minimum working example

from aevum.core import Engine
from aevum.core.consent.models import ConsentGrant

engine = Engine()
engine.add_consent_grant(ConsentGrant(
    grant_id="g1", subject_id="user-1", grantee_id="my-agent",
    operations=["ingest", "query"], purpose="demo",
    classification_max=0,
    granted_at="2026-01-01T00:00:00Z", expires_at="2030-01-01T00:00:00Z",
))
result = engine.ingest(
    data={"note": "example"},
    provenance={"source_id": "demo", "chain_of_custody": ["demo"],
                "classification": 0},
    purpose="demo", subject_id="user-1", actor="my-agent",
)
print(result.audit_id)   # urn:aevum:audit:<uuid7>
print(result.status)     # ok

## Documentation

Full docs:       https://aevum.build
Getting started: https://aevum.build/getting-started/quickstart/
How it works:    https://aevum.build/concepts/how-it-works/
API reference:   https://aevum.build/reference/engine/
Enterprise:      https://aevum.build/enterprise/overview/
GitHub:          https://github.com/aevum-labs/aevum
